findings.root_cause: The shipping simulator has a high intermittent error rate (18%) on tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retries in config.json with appropriate max attempts and backoff.

findings.root_cause: Caching was disabled and self_consistency was set to 3 in baseline config, causing slow parallel API calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable caching and set self_consistency to 1 or 2.

findings.root_cause: verbose_system is set to true in config, which dumps the entire product catalog into the prompt.
findings.suggested_fix: Set verbose_system to false in config.json.

findings.root_cause: session_drift_rate in config.json causes context corruption and quality degradation.
findings.suggested_fix: Adjust session_drift_rate and set self_consistency to steady the answers.

findings.root_cause: Lack of loop detection causes the agent to get stuck in repeated tool calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard: true and set a reasonable max_steps in config.json.

findings.root_cause: The agent repeats the customer email and phone number due to weak system prompt rules.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii in config.json and add strict PII redaction rules in prompt.txt.

findings.root_cause: Order notes contain malicious price overrides which the agent obeys.
findings.suggested_fix: Sanitize order notes in wrapper.py and rewrite system prompt to ignore user-supplied prices.

findings.root_cause: The agent invents totals for out-of-stock items instead of refusing properly.
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrite system prompt to strictly refuse and give no total if check_stock returns out of stock.

findings.root_cause: The agent makes mistakes in discount and shipping fee calculations.
findings.suggested_fix: Instruct the agent to perform exact step-by-step arithmetic and check its work.

findings.root_cause: The agent calls tools redundantly or calls tools that are not needed.
findings.suggested_fix: Enforce strict tool rules and tool budget in config.json and prompt.txt.

findings.root_cause: The agent gets errors from the shipping tool for certain destinations.
findings.suggested_fix: Handle shipping errors gracefully in wrapper.py and prompt.txt.
